title: Bitter Crispy Spanish Olive Tacos
description: A crispy, bitter, and flavorful vegan Spanish-inspired taco dish featuring olives and steamed vegetables, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the green olives and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the olives from the oil and set aside on a paper towel-lined plate.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook until they start to release their juices, about 2 minutes.
Add the artichoke hearts, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Steam the mixture for an additional 2 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the vegetable mixture onto a tortilla, topping with crispy olives, and garnishing with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lemon juice.
